item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very nice, and a good example of working up from history. Clinical tone is quite good.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I sincerely do enjoy this and I can tell it's had a lot of work put into it but I feel like it almost goes into a bit too much detail. Some of what entices me with an SCP is the inexplicable nature of its and the fact that it's often left up to the imagination, or just vague interpretation as to how certain aspects came to be, whereas this article feels like it rather readily explains it away immediately. This absolutely gets a +1 from me for the palpable amount of effort that was put into it, regardless.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: +1, I like this one a lot. Minor note, the addendums are still labeled XXXX.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was one of the folks who upvoted the original, so when I heard the rewrite looked substantially different I was a bit worried. Happy to see those worries were unfounded; I'm a fan of the additions here: the fact that SRAs don't effect it, the exploration log being a debrief (I completely forgot the original had an exploration log), and especially the equipment log (along with what it hints at). +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Rewrite! Image sources, crit credits, etc. are in the info bar at the top of the article.

Also, if a moderator/admin could change the Series 4 page and change the title of this article to be "Help I've Fallen and Can't Get Out", that would be awesome.
